top_signals.title: Japan to strengthen cyber defense for critical infrastructure
top_signals.summary: Japan's cybersecurity minister Hisashi Matsumoto said the government would work to build the "world's highest" cyber resilience.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
